title: Cell Lysis and Extraction of Total Protein from Synechocystis sp. PCC 6803
author: Anna Behle
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.ps6dnhe

steps.title: Prepare 1x TB (thylakoid-buffer)
steps.instruction: Prepare 1x TB (thylakoid-buffer). %s %s Component Concentration HEPES / NaOH, pH = 7 50 mM MgCl2 5 mM CaCl2 25 mM (optional: glycerol) 10 % (v/v) To 10 mL 1x TB: Add 1 tablet protease-inhibitor (complete ULTRA Tablets, Mini, EDTA-free, EASYpack by Roche)

steps.title: Grow cyanobacteria to an OD 750 of 0
steps.instruction: Grow cyanobacteria to an OD 750 of 0.5 - 1.0.

steps.title: Sample 10-20 mL of cyanobacterial culture
steps.instruction: Sample 10-20 mL of cyanobacterial culture. Pellet the cells at 4500 rpm, 4 ˚C.

steps.title: Work on ice
steps.instruction: Work on ice. Resuspend cell pellet in 200 µL 1x TP. Add an equal volume of glass beads (0.1 mm, 0.25 mm 1:1) Disrupt cells in Precellys homogenizer. Program: 4000 rpm, 2x 30 sec, 15sec pause, then back on ice Make sure to use tubes suited for disruption in homogenizer - some tubes will break and you may lose your sample!

steps.title: Centrifuge (4 ˚C, 4000 rpm, 5...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge (4 ˚C, 4000 rpm, 5 min), transfer supernatant to a fresh tube. Wash glass beads by adding 200 µL 1x TP. Repeat cell lysis step in Precellys.

steps.title: Centrifuge (4 ˚C, 4000 rpm, 5...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge (4 ˚C, 4000 rpm, 5 min), add supernatant to the supernatant from step 5.

steps.title: Centrifuge extract at maximum speed for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge extract at maximum speed for 30 min to 1 h, 4 ˚C. Soluble protein supernatant will appear blue, membrane pellet green. Check absorption spectrum of supernatant (chlorophyll peak at 665 nm should be completely gone).
